quick_skim.title: SL(3,Z) is not Howson
quick_skim.abstract: We give an explicit construction of two $2$-generated subgroups $H,K\leq \SL(3,\Z)$ whose intersection is not finitely generated. The construction takes place inside the standard parabolic subgroup $\Z^2\rtimes \SL(2,\Z)\leq \SL(3,\Z)$. The main point is to identify $H\cap K$ with the stabilizer of a point for an affine action of a free group on $\Z^2$, and then to prove, using the Schreier graph of this action, that this stabilizer is not finitely generated. Furthermore, we prove that there exists a sequence of subgroups $H_q, K_q \leq \SL(3,\mathbb{Z})$ such that $\rank(H_q)=\rank(K_q)=4$, and \[ \rank(H_q\cap K_q)\geq q+1, \] while $H_q\cap K_q$ is finitely generated.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Directly proves SL(3,Z) does not have the Howson property via construction of subgroups with non-finitely generated intersection
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 通过构造子群交非有限生成，直接证明SL(3,Z)不具有Howson性质
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 通过构造子群交非有限生成，直接证明SL(3,Z)不具有Howson性质
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 通过构造子群交非有限生成，直接证明SL(3,Z)不具有Howson性质
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper shows that SL(3,Z) is not a Howson group by constructing two 2-generated subgroups whose intersection is not finitely generated, using an affine action of a free group on Z^2 and analyzing its Schreier graph.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 论文研究SL(3,Z)的Howson性质。通过构造两个2生成子群，将其交与自由群在Z^2上的仿射作用的不动点稳定子等同，并利用Schreier图证明该稳定子非有限生成，从而证明了SL(3,Z)不具有Howson性质。此外还构造了一族子群使得交的秩可以任意大但有限生成。该工作给出了线性群中Howson性质的反例，对理解子群交的有限生成性有重要意义。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 论文研究SL(3,Z)的Howson性质。通过构造两个2生成子群，将其交与自由群在Z^2上的仿射作用的不动点稳定子等同，并利用Schreier图证明该稳定子非有限生成，从而证明了SL(3,Z)不具有Howson性质。此外还构造了一族子群使得交的秩可以任意大但有限生成。该工作给出了线性群中Howson性质的反例，对理解子群交的有限生成性有重要意义。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: groups with the Howson property of subgroup intersections
